title: STAR WARS™ Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II
notes: Game runs well. Mouse input is awful. Main menu appears locked to a very small resolution (didn't attempt to troubleshoot).

title: STAR WARS™ Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II
notes: Single player functions identically to Windows. Multiplayer does not work: the DirectPlay protocol listing appears garbled, and none of the options can be used to host or join a game.
Run in quarter size screen, menu is not selectable with mouse, cannot be played

notes: Issues with fullscreen in menu. In game works with 4k. Played through first mission without any issues noticed.
title: STAR WARS™ Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II

notes: Menu system and cut-scenes are small (in top left)  Menu selection is totally offset and tricky to select. In Options -> Display -> Enable 3d acceleration. This gives access to higher resolutions. eg 1080

and the command
wine JK.exe  -windowgui -devmode -path Mod
